task_description: list all symbolic links and their targets
code:
echo "Listing symbolic links and their targets in the current directory..."
find . -maxdepth 1 -type l -exec ls -l {} + | awk '{print $NF" -> "$11}'

trace.stdout: Listing symbolic links and their targets in the current directory...

messages.content:
```bash
echo "Listing symbolic links and their targets in the current directory..."
find . -maxdepth 1 -type l -exec ls -l {} + | awk '{print $9" -> "$11}'
```
